free_text: Photoabsorption cross sections in the isotopes of Pr,
Bi, and Ta in the energy region Egamma < 12 MeV.
Nonstability of the energy step is from 30 to 50 keV.
Cross sections were obtained from yield curves
The structure of photoneutron cross section on nuclei
lead, bismuth, tantalum  and oxygen was investigated
experimentally with a small step in the energy.  The
results are compared with data from other experiments
and with calculations using the quasiparticle-phonon
Data were compiled in SCJAD of Saratov
SD: Updated to new date formats,lower case.
Corrected according last EXFOR rules and Dict.
VV: STATUS, REACTION code was corrected.
Corrected by SD and VV: TITLE corrected
Corrected by SD and VV: PP-208 -> PB-208
Distilled water in a polyethylene cylinder
